tasks.label: git-commit-push
tasks.command: cd /workspaces/Nexus-HEMS-Dash && git add -A && git commit -m 'fix: PWA update, TariffsPage crash, EmergencyStop, theme color, Settings, CI, E2E' -m 'PWA: fix update notification interval leak, use updateServiceWorker(true)' -m 'PWA: theme_color green to dark navy (manifest+index.html+dynamic meta)' -m 'TariffsPage: wrap LivePriceWidget/PredictiveForecast in ErrorBoundary' -m 'PredictiveForecast: API response validation, division-by-zero guard' -m 'EmergencyStop: move from global fixed FAB to Settings Danger Zone' -m 'LanguageSwitcher: move from header to Settings Language section' -m 'Header: Settings icon always visible' -m 'TypeScript: fix 5 errors (EEBUSAdapter, ModbusSunSpec, OCPP21, command-safety)' -m 'Settings: consolidate duplicate imports' -m 'E2E: update lang switcher tests to navigate to /settings' -m 'i18n: add emergencyStopShort, emergencyStopSettingsHint, quickSwitch keys' && git push
